dct_title_s: The valley of Jehoshaphat : between Mount Moriah and the Mount of Olives
dct_description_sm: drawn by D. Roberts, from a sketch by the revd. R. Master ; engraved by W. Finden.
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Features illustrations of structures and people.
Shows topography, vegetation, drainage, places of historical interest.
